title: v0.5.1 consolidation — manual smoke pass on Rocky + dogfood validation

scope.smokePass: Execute the four manual smoke pass items left over from v0.5 phase 5 on a real Rocky 9.4 host (192.168.199.234)
scope.dogfood: Run the audit-log purge task end-to-end (Run-now + retention adjustment), watch the firewall 30s rollback live, verify operation_log captures every mutation made through the UI
scope.fixes: Address any bugs surfaced during smoke pass — release-pipeline bugs already fixed in cdb182b

manualChecklist: firewall driver detection picks the right backend
rollback safeguard auto-reverts when user closes tab without confirming
audit log captures every mutation made during smoke pass
scheduled purge task runs via Run-now and trims rows correctly
